examples: Twitter, like cablese, favours observation rather than analysis.
At 4:53 am local time on January 18th Juliana Rotich, a blogger in Kenya, tweeted in her own cablese, вАЬin town nbi.i can smell tear gas in the airвАЭ.
Foreign correspondents in the first half of the 20th century learned to write in cablese, a series of abbreviations demanded by news organisations that had to pay by the word.
